channel.title: MS Graph Registry Updates
channel.description: Real-time notifications for new Microsoft Graph Permissions

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentIdentityBlueprint.UpdateSponsors.All
item.description: Allows the app to add or remove sponsors for agent identity blueprint on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: AgentIdentity.UpdateSponsors.All
item.description: Allows the app to add or remove sponsors for agent identities on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CopilotPolicySettings.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write Copilot policy settings for the organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamworkSection.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's teamwork sections (folders) for organizing chats and channels in Teams.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamworkSection.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write all users' teamwork sections (folders) for organizing chats and channels in Teams, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CopilotPolicySettings.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write Copilot policy settings for the organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamworkSection.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all users' teamwork sections (folders) for organizing chats and channels in Teams, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CopilotPolicySettings.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read Copilot policy settings for the organization, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentIdentity.UpdateSponsors.All
item.description: Allows the app to add or remove sponsors for agent identities without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentIdentityBlueprint.UpdateSponsors.All
item.description: Allows the app to add or remove sponsors for agent identity blueprint without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TeamworkSection.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the signed-in user's teamwork sections (folders) for organizing chats and channels in Teams.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CopilotPolicySettings.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read Copilot policy settings for the organization, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: EntraBackup.ReadWrite.Recovery
item.description: Allows the app to list the all the snapshots, create a recovery job and enumerate the changes of a specific recovery job, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: EntraBackup.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to list the all the snapshots, jobs and enumerate the changes of a specific preview job, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: EntraBackup.ReadWrite.Preview
item.description: Allows the app to list the all the snapshots, create a preview job and enumerate the changes of a specific preview job, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EntraBackup.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to list the all the snapshots, jobs and enumerate the changes of a specific preview job, on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: EduReports-Reflect.ReadAnonymous.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all tenant users reflect check-ins submissions data (excludes responder-identifying information) without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: Policy.ReadWrite.SecurityDefaults
item.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's security defaults policy without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForUser.All
item.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in any user account, without a signed-in user. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific users' data.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: OnlineMeetings.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and create online meetings on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: AgentIdentityBlueprint.Create
item.description: Allows creating new agent identity blueprints without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Sites.Archive.All
item.description: Allow the application to archive/unarchive site collections on behalf of the signed in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Application.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update and delete applications and service principals on behalf of the signed-in user. Does not allow management of consent grants.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: DelegatedAdminRelationship.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to manage (create-update-terminate) Delegated Admin relationships with customers as well as role assignments to security groups for active Delegated Admin relationships on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: BookingsAppointment.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows an app to read and write bookings appointments and customers, and additionally allows read businesses information, services, and staff on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrintJob.ReadWriteBasic
item.description: Allows the application to read and update the metadata of print jobs that the signed-in user created. Does not allow access to print job document content.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-WindowsHello.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's Windows Hello authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: IndustryData-SourceSystem.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write source system definitions on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Notes.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read, share, and modify OneNote notebooks on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: TermStore.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read the term store data that the signed-in user has access to. This includes all sets, groups and terms in the term store.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: PrintJob.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the application to read and update the metadata and document content of print jobs that the signed-in user created.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: ApprovalSolution.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read approvals event information for all users in your organization without a signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: GroupSettings.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read a list of tenant-level or group-specific group settings objects, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Tasks.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to create, read, update, and delete the signed-in user's tasks and task lists, including any shared with the user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-Passkey.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write passkey authentication methods of all users in your organization that the signed-in user has access to. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Content.Process.User
item.description: Allows the app to process and evaluate content for data security, governance and compliance outcomes for a user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: RealTimeActivityFeed.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to get direct access to real-time enriched data in a meeting, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CopilotSettings-LimitedMode.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write organization-wide copilot limited mode setting on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Device.Command
item.description: Allows the app to launch another app or communicate with another app on a user's device on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: CloudPC.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the properties of Cloud PCs on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityIncident.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read all security incidents, without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: EduRoster.ReadWrite
item.description: Allows the app to read and write the structure of schools and classes in an organization's roster and education-specific information about users to be read and written on behalf of the user.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: SecurityIdentitiesSensors.ReadWrite.All
item.description: Allows the app to read and write identity security sensors without a signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedPersonal] New Permission: Device.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read your organization's devices' configuration information on behalf of the signed-in user.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: Analytics.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's activity statistics, such as how much time the user has spent on emails, in meetings, or in chat sessions.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: ServiceMessageViewpoint.Write
item.description: Allows the app to update service announcement messages' admin user status on behalf of the signed-in admin user. The message status can be marked as read, archive, or favorite.

item.title: [DelegatedWork] New Permission: UserAuthMethod-QR.Read
item.description: Allows the app to read the signed-in user's QR authentication methods. This does not allow the app to see secret information like passwords, or to sign-in or otherwise use the authentication methods.

item.title: [Application] New Permission: CustomSecAttributeAssignment.Read.All
item.description: Allows the app to read custom security attribute assignments for all principals in the tenant without a signed in user.
